---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for AI-Engineer-OS
title: "feat: [Short description of the feature]"
labels: ["enhancement", "proposal"]
assignees: []
---

## 🎯 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

## 💡 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the new components, UI elements, or backend integrations.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockups (If applicable)
Add visual mockups, wireframes, or descriptive outlines of how the interface should change.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, technical references, or API documentation links here.
